comments.body:

            <groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId>

        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.milvus</groupId>

        </dependency>
i am adding dependency mannually instead of starter just to use the newest version of milvus. i think this cause such a problem

issues.title: Rename ChatGenerationMetadata to GenerationMetadata
issues.body: This makes the name consistent with other metadata classes.

comments.body: Closing this issue as invalid as we decided to keep the name as the way they are currently now.

issues.title: Remove getMetadata method in Content interface
issues.body:
This had been used to return additional information about the generation because we didn't have a first class place to store the metadata.  Now we do have that location, as `Generation` implements `ModelResult<AssistantMessage>` which has a place for metadata.

We should then remove `Map<String, Object> getMetadata();` from `interface Content`

Places to look for removing the assignment of metadata are in the various model class implementation such as `OpenAiChatModel` and moving metadata such as `finish_reason` into `ChatGenerationMetadata`

comments.body: Decided not to do this, closing
